creator: trhodes@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The protoize utility was removed in FreeBSD 7 as part of 
GCC.  Given that there will not be another 6.X release[1], 
close this PR.  Besides, the manual page request should 
be submitted directly to the GCC developers in any case. 
Thanks! 

[1]: Taken from: http://www.freebsd.org/releases/6.4R/announce.html 
"At this time 6.4-RELEASE is expected to be the last of 
the 6-STABLE releases."
